full_description: Open the closed cabinet and identify what colored object is inside.
schema: {A} denotes the hidden object inside the container, {B} denotes the closed container, {b} denotes the arm used to open the container
preference: Mention that the object identity should be determined only after opening the container.
seen: Check that the object is hidden, open the container, then look inside to identify {A}.
Use {b} to open {B}, then determine which colored block is inside.
Open the cabinet and report the hidden object's identity.
Look inside {B} after opening it and identify {A}.
unseen: Find out what is inside the closed container.
Open the cabinet and inspect the object inside.
Identify the hidden colored block after opening the container.

seen: confirm {A} is not visible before opening
unseen: look for the hidden object before opening the container
